scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/schema.ts src/brain.ts src/brain-cli.ts src/brain-gemini.ts src/tool-registry.ts src/chat-lock.ts src/rate-limiter.ts src/numbered-refs.ts src/module-loader.ts src/command-registry.ts src/callback-registry.ts src/framework-info.ts src/bot-store.ts src/skill-loader.ts src/reception.ts src/testing/index.ts src/testing/MockAdapter.ts src/testing/clock.ts --format esm --dts --clean && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const cp=require('child_process');let sha='unknown';try{sha=cp.execSync('git rev-parse HEAD',{encoding:'utf-8'}).trim()}catch{}fs.writeFileSync('dist/FRAMEWORK_SHA',sha+'\n')"
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts src/schema.ts src/brain.ts src/brain-cli.ts src/brain-gemini.ts src/tool-registry.ts src/chat-lock.ts src/rate-limiter.ts src/numbered-refs.ts src/module-loader.ts src/command-registry.ts src/callback-registry.ts src/framework-info.ts src/bot-store.ts src/skill-loader.ts src/reception.ts src/testing/index.ts src/testing/MockAdapter.ts src/testing/clock.ts --format esm --dts --watch
